item.title: Looking for words to describe this
item.dc:creator: 2B4U

item.title: Assorted All Video Dump
item.description:
Hey hey Imgurians! I’m in a great mood for no reason whatsoever. A rare high. So I’m gonna ride this out with a wild dump. Check your wifi, buckle up, and stay classy.
Cause why wouldn’t your boat be way up on a cliff.
Fun to send to coworkers to see if their phone volume is on at work lol
I love manufacturing videos of wildly unsafe working conditions.
#5 Many of my Chinese manufacturing videos came from an Imgurian that hasn’t posted in a while.
I haven’t been on Imgur long, but I used to search for his username before I even had an account so I could see what new gems he posted.
When I joined, I messaged him. Like, one of the first things I did. He hadn’t been active for a few months at that point. I fear Covid or some other catastrophe got him. Sigh.
#10
#15
#20
#25
#30
Cat tax
#35
#40
#45
Joey tax Hope you all enjoyed the dump. Have a fantastic rest of your day and have a safe memorable weekend!
item.dc:creator: knowallknownothing

item.title: My favorite webcomics dump (various artists)
item.description:
Some "Inception" sh1t...
The last one is OC - "Literalist Mobster Jimmy". Please check the other episodes here: https://www.webtoons.com/en/challenge/literalist-mobster-jimmy/list?title_no=81510&page=1 :)

item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: 19 February
item.description: I try to post this every year because I believe that we can not grow as a country with out confronting our past. America has always been at war with itself and we have stumbled just as often as we have stride. I love my country, but I also believe that she can improve. Never stop fighting for justice.
item.dc:creator: sevenfingerman

item.title: Rudy is saying Eminem should leave this country bc he took at knee at the Super Bowl halftime show. And now a rebuttal from Em
item.description: Colbert late night show. Pretty damn witty considering how fast they had to put this together
item.dc:creator: Juantaconeverenuff

item.title: 80 years ago today...
item.description:
I read this meme differently.
Because I know the truth.
It happened in Europe, it happened here too.
...more recently than we want to remember.
It can happen here again.
item.dc:creator: jansenart

item.title: Well-done steak, diet Coke, Lays potato chips...... sounds Rich and Fabulous to me

458 https://www.washingtonian.com/2021/02/19/trump-hotel-employees-tell-all-what-it-was-really-like-serving-right-wing-elite

item.title: Aaaaand here we go again !
item.description: Jean-Luc Brunel, good friend of Jeffrey Epstein and Maxwell, was found dead in his cell this morning in Paris. He was found hanged. He was accused of rapes on minor girls and sexual harassment, an investigation is underway.
